Website Design

Clear Messaging
Lead Structure
Malaysian Businesses

Sound familiar?

Homestay or Airbnb

Your listing gets 200 views a week but only 2 bookings.

Consultancy or agency

Clients ask you to explain what you do, even after seeing your site.

Local service business

You're on Google Maps, but nobody finds you online.

If this is you
  • Your site looks fine — but no one enquires.
  • You can't say what makes you different in one line.
  • Visitors leave before they ever reach your offer.
Here's the fix
  • A site built to turn visitors into enquiries.
  • A clear message that lands in seconds.
  • A page journey that leads straight to your offer.
Story

Your website should make the next step obvious.

LUMIO Coordia Intelligence builds clear websites for service businesses that need visitors to understand the offer, trust the business, and know how to enquire.

We shape the message, page journey, pricing path, proof, and contact flow before building, so the finished site feels useful rather than decorative.

Trusted by 20+ businesses across Hong Kong, Macau, Malaysia, and Singapore, our work combines design, development, and business strategy.

We believe a good website should pay for itself in 6 months by making your offer easier to understand and easier to act on.

20+businesses 4regions 6 mo.payback mindset
Client words

What it's like to work with us.

Process

Simple from
the client side.

Share the need

Tell us what you want to improve, launch, or simplify. No brief required — a conversation is enough to get started.

01
Confirm the direction

We turn the request into a clear offer, page structure, and build scope. You approve the direction before a single pixel is drawn.

02
We execute

We design, build, test, and prepare the approved work for launch. You bring the need. We handle the rest.

03
How it works
01
Step 01

Share the need

Tell us what you want to improve, launch, or simplify.

02
Step 02

Confirm direction

We turn the request into a clear offer, page structure, and build scope.

03
Step 03

We execute

We design, build, test, and prepare the approved work for launch.

Pricing

Choose your level.

Pick the level that matches how much growth pressure your website needs to carry, from a clear first impression to a complete sales path.

Starter
RM 1,500+

A focused website for launch, credibility, and a clear contact path.

  • Simple website
  • Mobile ready
  • Clear contact path

Growth
RM 4,000+

A stronger web presence with clearer lead structure and basic automation.

  • Custom pages
  • Lead structure
  • Basic automation
Get started →
Premium
RM 8,000+

A custom build for businesses that need better UX and connected systems.

  • Advanced build

Quote

For complex scopes, business systems, and ongoing support.

Use this table to choose the level before we confirm the exact scope.

Feature Starter Growth Premium Custom
Pages1-3 pages5-8 pages10+ pagesCustom
Mobile responsiveYesYesYesYes
Contact formYesYesYesYes

Automation flowNoYesYesYes

Custom UX designNoNoYesYes
System integrationNoNoNoYes
Ongoing supportNoNoNoYes

Cancel before kickoff for a full refund, with clear, fair refunds at every milestone after. No lock-in, no surprises.

Legal

  • Privacy Policy
  • Refund Policy
  • Terms of Service
© 2026 LUMIO Coordia Intelligence. All rights reserved.

Refund Policy

How Payments Work

Every project uses a 50% deposit before work starts, and 50% final payment before launch. No final payment is requested until you've approved the finished work.

Deposit Refunds

The deposit is non-refundable once work has started. Exceptions: cancel within 48 hours of paying (before any work begins), or if we can't start within 30 days of the agreed date.

Milestone Refunds

Cancelled before kickoff100% refund
Cancelled after kickoff, before design50% refund
Cancelled during design25% refund
Cancelled during buildNo refund

Scope & Delays

You'll never be charged for scope changes without prior written agreement. If your project is paused 60+ days with no response, a re-activation fee of RM 450 may apply.

Raise a Dispute

WhatsApp +853 6328 7209 or email ShanyiDanyi@outlook.com. We respond within 1 business day and resolve billing disputes within 5.
